description: Complete Level 1 of the 'Practice the addition operation' activity in GCompris by correctly answering at least 5 consecutive single-digit addition problems. Document the session in a report at /home/ga/Documents/addition_report.txt. The report must include the header 'GCompris Addition Practice Report', the total number of problems solved, at least 3 examples of the problems solved (formatted as 'X + Y = Z'), and a note regarding the difficulty level.
